channel.title: performance on cgois
channel.description: Recent content in performance on cgois

item.title: CVXPY vs. PICOS: performance comparison for linear programs
item.description: CVXPY and PICOS are two frequently used optimization program modelling tools for Python. I compare their performance in modelling simple random linear programs.

item.title: Parallelizing simple loops in Python
item.description: Parallelizing loops with no iteration interdependence using Pythons’ concurrent.futures module.
